title: Starmer Was Warned About Risk of Appointing Friend of Epstein as Ambassador
summary_full: British officials told Prime Minister Keir Starmer of Peter Mandelson’s close ties to Jeffrey Epstein before Mr. Mandelson was appointed U.S. ambassador.
summary_public: British officials told Prime Minister Keir Starmer of Peter Mandelson’s close ties to Jeffrey Epstein before Mr. Mandelson was appointed U.S. ambassador.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: Starmer Was Warned About Risk of Appointing Friend of Epstein
